Red Dragon
Phantom Hunter Gear

When taking damage from an attack, the unit has a 40% chance to absorb it. If this happens, the unit deals physical damage equal to 100% of their attack to the attacker.

Once in a while when taking damage, the unit absorbs that damage and deals physical damage equal to 250% of their attack to all enemies.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
